name: Potatoes with Sesame Seeds
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure equal amounts of cumin and black mustard seeds, with plenty of sesame seeds.
2. Use only a small amount of lemon juice due to its strong flavor.
3. Use cayenne sparingly because it has an extremely intense flavor.
4. Heat oil in a pan until hot.
5. Add all the seeds to the pan. When the black mustard seeds begin popping, add the potatoes and other spices.
6. Cook the potatoes until they reach your desired level of doneness.
